project_type: TypeScript monorepo - device-control package for Quant AI assistant
test_framework: vitest with vi mocks, tests in src/__tests__/
verification_instructions: Run typecheck and vitest for the device-control package
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full access. Node 22, pnpm available.
contribution_requirements: 500 LOC max per PR, single commit message: feat(device-control): add Twilio SMS provider with message store and agent
key_patterns: Dual-mode providers (real Twilio when creds present, mock when absent), CapabilityProvider<T> interface pattern, CallSessionManager for state tracking, CallAgent for intent dispatch, PermissionManager with tier-based access control (sms = tier 3), vitest with mock objects
directory_structure: packages/device-control/src/ contains: capabilities/ (interfaces), providers/ (implementations + types), agents/ (intent dispatchers), permissions/ (permission-manager, tier maps), audit/ (action-audit), registry.ts, __tests__/ (vitest tests)
